title: Givebutter Nonprofit Fundraising
description: Givebutter Nonprofit Fundraising provides eligible nonprofit or social-impact organizations with nonprofit discounts, fundraising tools, communications tools, productivity tools under its current published program terms.
eligibility: Organizations must satisfy the provider's current nonprofit-status verification, acceptable-use, product, and regional requirements.
value: Fundraising, events, auctions, and donor-management tools under Givebutter's current pricing model.
